SOUL OF ARTS

Unleash Your Creativity • Art Classes for All Age Groups

About Soul of Arts

Whether you're a beginner or an aspiring artist, Soul of Arts provides structured learning for children, teens and adults. Students explore drawing, sketching, painting, crafts, creativity and artistic skill development in a fun environment.

Programs & Curriculum

Age-wise Learning Levels

Level 1 (3–5 Years)

Crayons, Pencil Colours, Oil Pastels

Level 2 (6–10 Years)

Water Colours, Poster Colours, Acrylic Colours

Level 3 (11–14 Years)

Canvas, Pen Art, Pencil Sketching, Charcoal Art, Fabric Colours

Art Forms Taught

Canvas Painting
Portrait Painting
Landscape Painting
Water Colour Painting
Warli Art
Doodle Art
Zentangle Art
Free Hand Drawing

Craft Workshops

Origami
Clay Modelling
Mask Making
Handmade Lamps
Wall Hangings
Paper Cuttings
DIY Craft Projects
